title: U.S. Asked to Keep Military Planes in Sri Lanka Before Iran Airstrikes
summary_full: Sri Lanka did not agree to the request, officials said, and has tried to remain neutral in the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran.
summary_public: Sri Lanka did not agree to the request, officials said, and has tried to remain neutral in the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran.
